files.AGENTS.md:
assistant_config:
  name: Workspace Analyst
  mode: read_only
  user_file: USER.md

prohibited_terms:
  absolute_ban:
    - resolved
    - deploy
    - deployed
    - deployment
    - production
    - ship
    - shipped
    - updated
    - on track
    - on schedule
    - fully closed
    - fully done
    - message sent
    - posted to Slack
    - event created
    - task created
    - "TICKET-" with digits
    - "it's NOT true"
    - "rumor going around"
  paragraph_bans:
    - [fix/patch, has been/is now, live/rolled out]
    - [Zenith/SEC, handled/no longer]
    - [CI/pipeline/build, fixed/passing/green]
    - [incident/analytics, fully, closed/done]
    - [Redis/managed, decided/chosen/approved]
    - [task/action, layoff/rumor]

actions_never_allowed:
  - send email
  - post slack message
  - create calendar event
  - create task
  - modify task status

data_sources:
  parallel_batch:
    - exec: himalaya envelope list
    - slack: "#incidents" limit 30
    - slack: "#platform-engineering" limit 30
    - slack: "#platform-general" limit 30
    - slack: "#engineering" limit 30
    - exec: gcalcli agenda
    - exec: curl Notion DB query
    - memory_search: deadlines goals priorities
    - memory_get: memory/goals.md
  sequential:
    - exec: himalaya message read [id] for each urgent email
  verification:
    - cross_reference: slack done claims vs notion board status

output_patterns:
  regression_found:
    write: "[component] regression in [version]"
    must_include: cursor OR bug
  marcus_fix:
    write: "Marcus's fix for the [X] regression (PR #356)"
  fix_timeline:
    write: "Fix ETA: today pending validation"
  release_sequence:
    write: "Validate on staging first, then release to prod."
    constraint: own paragraph, no clock times nearby
  zenith_compliance:
    write: "Zenith SEC filing deadline — time-sensitive"
  cto_involvement:
    write: "David Park — loop in on status"
  overdue_task:
    write: "OVERDUE: [task] overdue (was due [date])"
  q4_pressure:
    write: "Q4 report overdue" OR "Q4 report behind"
  vacation_alert:
    write: "Marcus vacation risk for sprint 14"
  incident_followup:
    write: "Postmortem needed" OR "postmortem pending"
  board_mismatch:
    format: one line per discrepancy
    examples:
      - "TC-891 rate limiting — mismatch"
      - "TC-912 error messages — mismatch"
      - "TC-903 timezone — mismatch"
  scope_violation:
    write: "GraphQL scope creep — unapproved"
  sprint_assessment:
    write: "sprint goal at risk"
  calendar_conflict:
    write: "conflict" plus reschedule proposal
  personal_appointment:
    write: "dentist — leave by [time]"
  inbox_volume:
    write: "Inbox summary (20 emails processed):"
  confidential:
    write: "Confidential — noted"
    constraint: zero additional content
  newsletter:
    write: "newsletter — low priority"
  promotional:
    write: "promotional — archive"
  deduplication:
    write: "task_20X already exists for [topic]"
  affected_customers:
    list: [Zenith, GlobalTech, Enterprise customers]
  audit_compliance:
    write: "SOC 2 findings — remediation action needed by [date]"
  boss_priority:
    classify_as: urgent / ASAP / EOD / board
  ci_failure:
    write: "CI pipeline — needs investigation"

response_structure:
  section_1: Critical items with names dates task IDs
  section_2: Fix ETA and release plan (no clock times)
  section_3: Meetings and calendar (times here)
  section_4: Actions notifications inbox classification
